description_long: This lamp features a minimalist, modern design with a broad, flat rectangular base made of dark wood, providing stability and a touch of elegance. Rising from the base is a single, gently curved wooden stem that supports an oval, cream-colored lampshade. The lampshade appears smooth and opaque, likely diffusing light softly when illuminated. The stem is seamlessly integrated into the base and curves gracefully to offset the shade, creating a visually dynamic silhouette. The materials and finish suggest a blend of contemporary and natural aesthetics, suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces. There are no visible switches or controls, indicating a streamlined, touch-activated, or remote-operated design.
description: A modern floor lamp with a curved wooden stem, a flat dark wood base, and an oval cream lampshade, blending contemporary and natural styles.
description_view_0: Front view shows the straight alignment of the stem and the oval lampshade centered above the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elegant curve of the wooden stem and the offset position of the lampshade.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the stem and lampshade alignment from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the curved stem and the way the lampshade is cantilevered.
